/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tcpServer.dir/TcpClientThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcpServer.dir/tcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcpServer.dir/TcpServerConfig.cpp.o -o ../../bin/tcpServer  ../../lib/libApplCore.a ../../lib/libAppUtils.a ../../lib/libNetUtils.a ../../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../../lib/libConfigUtils.a ../../lib/libminiupnpc.a ../../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../../lib/libSysUtils.a ../../lib/libAppUtils.a -ldl ../../lib/libspdlog.a
